sceneAudits.biggestGap: The village sweep had strong dread but still leaned on generic search language in the house and granary passes.

dialogue: Cyndia reporting with soot on her bracer
Jaina kneeling in split grain while Sylvanas clears the room
Cyndia crouched in the cabbage-bed spoor
exit: warning held until the spoor was trustworthy

sceneAudits.scene: Scene 2 - The Survivor and the Proof
sceneAudits.biggestGap: The witness sequence risked floating into testimony without enough cellar and road-contact texture around it.

dialogue: Neral crouching empty-handed in the cellar
Jaina's dimmed staff against damp mortar
Miri clutching cloak and waterskin through her testimony
exit: Jaina separating tainted sign from ordinary road damage
north-northeast movement physically confirmed before dispatch

sceneAudits.scene: Scene 3 - The Grain Seller on the Road
sceneAudits.biggestGap: The aftermath sequence risked thinning into logistics instead of staying tied to gear, wagon texture, and reduced-party pressure.

dialogue: Neral speaking with a hand on the mare's girth
trader exchange tied to reins, wagon, and the empty lane
Jaina remounting with mud and grain dust still on her
exit: reduced escort counted in horses and saddlebags
southbound road re-anchored in fallow fields and hedgerows

risksFound: dispatch-and-trader aftermath could have gone abstract
source draft carried unsourced escort naming
fixesApplied: kept the tail bound to dispatch gear, horseflesh, wagon texture, and the shrinking party
removed unsourced escort naming and kept the rider unnamed per plan
